hero.title: Test Drive
hero.description: TypeHue lets you test Google Font pairings and full color themes on actual UI layouts, in real time, with full Arabic & RTL support. Built by a dev, for devs, based on actual needs.

features.title: A theme testbed,
features.description: Most tools show you a font in isolation. TypeHue applies your choices - fonts, weights, palettes - to full UI layouts and changes them live to find the perfect visual harmony.
features.item_1_desc: Test your entire color system, backgrounds, surfaces, borders, text, not just a primary swatch. See contrast and hierarchy live.
features.item_2_desc: Search and pair any Google Font. Adjust weight, size, spacing, and line height with live feedback across the whole layout.
features.item_3_desc: Layouts are bidirectional. Switch to Arabic and test your font choices with proper RTL layout - something no other tool does well.
features.item_4_desc: Test on real UI patterns: dashboards, landing pages, forms. More layouts are coming - and you can add your own via pull request.

about.description_p1: I build enterprise solutions end-to-end — dashboards, design systems, internal tools. Every project starts with the same problem: I need to pick fonts and colors that work together on a real interface, not in a Figma frame.
about.description_p2: Every tool I tried was either paywalled, too basic, or ignored Arabic entirely. So I built the thing I actually needed: a live skinning engine that runs in the browser, costs nothing, and respects RTL out of the box.
about.quote: The only way to know if a font works is to see it in context; with colors, on real layouts, in all languages.

cta.title: Come build it with me.
cta.description: TypeHue is MIT-licensed and designed to grow. Add a layout, contribute a preset, fix a bug... the architecture is built for it. Your contributions help make this tool useful for everyone.

footer.description: TypeHue is a personal project born out of a frustration with existing font preview tools. It's built to be fast, useful, and open.

seo.title: TypeHue | Real-time Font & Color Theme Tester
seo.description: Free, open-source font and color theme tester. Preview Google Fonts and full palettes on real UI layouts — with first-class Arabic and RTL support.
seo.keywords: typography tester, color palette tool, font pairing, google fonts preview, developer tools, theme tester, RTL support
